evidence: "I thoroughly enjoyed this movie that extolls the excesses and degradation of a Wall Street trader."
"I love the normality of the man with the big yellow hat."
"The character amazes me and the story line is unpredictable."
"Luther continues to capture my attention and the main character will keep you guessing about his next move."
"It was a bit slow and somewhat predictable, but a good storyline."
"If you don't know what it's about, start with Season 1 and watch it from the beginning."
"This is Leonardo DiCaprio at one of his very best performances."
"The program depicts a sharp-shooter's job from the perspective of the individual who has to shoot to kill."
"I can't wait for season 4; I sincerely hope that BBC will grant us with more episodes of the machinations of Luther."
"Watch it from the beginning and get caught up before the next season begins in America in January 2014."
"I felt as if I were observing life during that period in real time."
"I find myself cheering for all of the characters and the issues they are dealing with."
"It allowed me to feel compassion for its main character and understand what it means to experience discrimination from a non-racial perspective."
"After watching a few episodes, I was totally and mentally involved with the program's characters."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama, comedy, and animation, with a strong preference for complex narratives and high production quality. They are emotionally engaged with the content, often feeling a deep connection to the characters and stories presented.
